content: Data exports are available to admins and compliance managers. Agents can request an export only when an admin grants temporary export permission. Export links expire after seven days and should not be forwarded outside the customer's organization.

Only account owners can change the billing contact. Support may explain the steps but must not change billing ownership for a customer. If the owner is unavailable, route the case to account verification.

Trial workspaces are retained for 30 days after trial expiration. During retention, admins can export data or upgrade the workspace. After retention ends, deleted trial data cannot be restored by support.
